name: codexmate_lib::core::relay::web_tools::executor::execute_with_web_tools::{{closure}}
role: outer tool loop; drives execute_proxy_tools per iteration; calls reqwest POST /v1/chat/completions; partitions tool_calls; calls build_passthrough_response when done

name: codexmate_lib::core::relay::web_tools::executor::execute_proxy_tools::{{closure}}
role: inner tool dispatch loop; handles tool_calls array iteration; calls append_assistant_and_tool_results on each result; POST JSON to upstream

name: codexmate_lib::core::relay::web_tools::executor::build_passthrough_response
role: builds passthrough JSON response from choices[].summary_text[].completed; copies tool_calls/reasoning_content into new array; sync

name: codexmate_lib::core::relay::web_tools::executor::append_assistant_and_tool_results
role: appends tool_result messages to JSON messages array; inserts type+tool_call_id+call_id per tool call; sync

name: codexmate_lib::core::relay::web_tools::fetch::fetch_raw_text::{{closure}}
role: async fetch leaf; builds GET request with header+timeout; awaits reqwest Pending; reads response text body

name: core::ptr::drop_in_place<codexmate_lib::core::relay::web_tools::executor::send_request::{{closure}}>
role: destructor only; drops reqwest::Pending or Response at state bytes +41/+752; NOT the poll body for send_request

name: reqwest::async_impl::request::RequestBuilder::send
role: HTTP send terminal; creates reqwest Pending future via Client::execute_request; 144 bytes; library leaf
